notes: ERR-052 through ERR-054 are from May 2 session — postprocessor and pipeline fixes.

errors.trigger: Ollama response exceeds 300s timeout
errors.solution: Reduce chunk size by 20% (e.g., 1500→1200 chars) and retry
errors.prevention: Set chunk_size ≤ 1200 for models ≤ 7B parameters

errors.trigger: Myanmar char ratio < 70% after 3 retries — model translates idioms to English explanation instead
errors.solution: Add to retry prompt: 'Do NOT explain. Translate the FEELING into Myanmar metaphor.'
errors.prevention: Include this instruction in base system prompt for Stage 1

errors.trigger: Model uses phonetic variant not in glossary
errors.solution: Add variant as alias in glossary.json. Re-run postprocessor on saved file.
errors.prevention: Inject glossary with strict instruction: 'Use EXACTLY these spellings. No variants.'

errors.trigger: Model outputs Bengali Unicode characters (U+0980–U+09FF) inside Myanmar text
errors.solution: Run postprocessor regex to strip U+0980–U+09FF range. Flag chunk for re-translation.
errors.prevention: Add to system prompt: 'Bengali script (U+0980–U+09FF) is STRICTLY FORBIDDEN. Myanmar Unicode only.'

errors.trigger: chunk_overlap > 0 causes the same sentence at end of chunk N and start of chunk N+1
errors.solution: Set chunk_overlap=0 in Chunker. Add boundary deduplication in postprocessor before saving.
errors.prevention: Chunker must split on paragraph boundaries only, never mid-paragraph by character count

errors.trigger: Ollama crashes with out-of-memory on large chapters (> 2000 chars per chunk)
errors.solution: Switch to smaller model (qwen:7b) for this chapter. Reduce chunk_size to 800.
errors.prevention: Monitor GPU VRAM — if < 2GB free before chapter start, use qwen:7b automatically

errors.trigger: Archaic words သင်သည် / ဤ / ထို appear in Myanmar output instead of modern equivalents
errors.solution: Add to retry prompt: 'Use modern storytelling words: မင်း / ဒီ / အဲဒီ. Never use သင်သည်, ဤ, ထို.'
errors.prevention: Add STRICT RULE to Editor (Stage 2) system prompt: avoid archaic words

errors.trigger: Same Myanmar particle (သည်/ကို/မှာ/၏) appears > 2× per paragraph — hallucination loop
errors.solution: Run postprocessor particle repetition detector. Re-translate chunk with repeat_penalty increased by 0.1.
errors.prevention: Use repeat_penalty ≥ 1.15 in sampling params. Add particle diversity rule to Editor prompt.

errors.trigger: 【?term?】 placeholder tokens are guessed/resolved by model instead of preserved
errors.solution: Run postprocessor to detect missing placeholders. Re-translate with stronger instruction: 'Never guess 【?term?】 — preserve exactly.'
errors.prevention: Add to ALL agent system prompts: '【?term?】 tokens must be preserved verbatim. Never resolve or guess.'

errors.trigger: Pronoun hierarchy violation — မင်း/ရှင်/ကျွန်တော် used incorrectly for character status
errors.solution: Re-translate dialogue sections with explicit character status context (senior/junior/equal).
errors.prevention: Pass active_characters from context_memory.json with status hierarchy to prompt.

errors.trigger: Chinese SVO word order survives into Myanmar SOV output (verb before object)
errors.solution: Re-translate with explicit SVO→SOV instruction. Flag sentences where object appears after verb.
errors.prevention: Add SVO→SOV conversion rule as first instruction in all translator prompts.

errors.trigger: Chapter file naming convention mismatch — code only looks for {chapter:03d}.md but files use varied naming
errors.solution: Add _find_chapter_file() with 5 naming patterns and _discover_chapters() with regex fallback
errors.prevention: Support multiple file naming conventions in chapter discovery

errors.trigger: Multiple quality issues: Bengali leak, duplication, metadata in body, register mix, heading format, emotional intensity
errors.solution: Comprehensive fix across 6 files: postprocessor, preprocessor, translator, quality_checker, orchestrator, settings
errors.prevention: Run full quality audit on output before marking chapter done

errors.trigger: Preprocessor.detect_language() returns 'unknown' for text < 50 chars
errors.solution: Ensure test inputs exceed 50-char minimum length
errors.prevention: Document minimum input length requirement for auto-detection

errors.trigger: remove_latin_words regex r'\s+' collapses all whitespace including newlines
errors.solution: Change regex to r'[^\S\n]+' to only collapse horizontal whitespace
errors.prevention: Always test postprocessor with multi-paragraph input

errors.trigger: Orchestrator passes wrong parameters to agent constructors
errors.solution: Match constructor signatures exactly — check agent __init__ before passing params from orchestrator
errors.prevention: All agents should have consistent constructor patterns. Test full pipeline initialization.

errors.trigger: padauk-gemma model outputs word-by-word glossary comparison lines (*:* "word" is . "other" is .) in translation output
errors.solution: Add postprocessor patterns for *:* lines with English comparison words. Add line-level *:* detection in strip_reasoning_process().
errors.prevention: Keep padauk-gemma temperature ≤ 0.2 to reduce hallucinations. Add anti-glossary-comparison instruction to translator prompt.

errors.trigger: remove_duplicate_headings() uses exact string match but headings vary slightly between chunks (different title text, with/without subtitle)
errors.solution: Use prefix matching on '# အခန်း N' pattern instead of exact string comparison. Reset in_duplicate_block flag when new chapter heading encountered.
errors.prevention: Always test deduplication with varied heading formats including minor character differences.

errors.trigger: Orchestrator _preprocess() calls clean_markdown() but NOT strip_metadata(). Credit lines (Translator: X Editor: Y) survive into chunks and get translated into output body.
errors.solution: Add strip_metadata() call in orchestrator _preprocess() before clean_markdown(). Add strip_translated_metadata() postprocessor as defense-in-depth for translated credit lines.
errors.prevention: Always strip metadata BEFORE chunking, not after. Test with source files containing Translator:/Editor: lines.

errors.trigger: replace_archaic_words() using python \b regex matches Myanmar combining marks (Mn) as \W, creating false word boundaries inside compounds like ထိုင်ခိုင်း
errors.solution: Use Myanmar consonant lookahead/lookbehind: (?<![က-အ])WORD(?!combining*[က-အ]). Add undo_archaic_corruptions() to fix pre-existing corruptions.
errors.prevention: NEVER use \b with Myanmar text. Use Myanmar-specific consonant boundaries.

errors.trigger: Tamil or other Indic scripts (U+0B80-U+0DFF) appear in Myanmar output — not caught by existing Chinese/Bengali/Thai detection
errors.solution: Add _INDIC_PATTERN covering 9 Indic script blocks. Strip in clean_output() unconditionally. Add to detect_language_leakage() and validate_output().
errors.prevention: Always strip ALL non-Myanmar scripts unconditionally — no script other than Myanmar should appear in output.
